name: codebase-documentor-for-aws
description: Analyze codebases to generate structured technical documentation with source-of-truth citations. Optimized for AWS workloads using CDK, CloudFormation, and Terraform.

interface.shortDescription: Analyze codebases and generate structured technical documentation with citations.
interface.longDescription: Analyze AWS-deployed services and codebases to generate structured technical documentation with source-of-truth citations linking every finding back to code.
defaultPrompt: Analyze this codebase and generate documentation.
I inherited this code — help me understand and document it.
Document the architecture and components of this service.
